creator: bill.brinzer@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145219
p5-Net-RabbitFoot-1.03-10.0-amd64.log

"poudriere testport" logs for this port on 10.0-RELEASE amd64.

I also have logs for 9.3-RELEASE amd64, and the i386 flavors of these releases, if you want them (but I'm guessing they are not necessary since the port is CPU 

independent as poudriere pointed out).
